title: lycium depressum subsp. angustifolium
intro: Lycium depressum subsp. angustifolium, also known as a type of Chinese boxthorn or Wolfberry, is a plant species within the Solanaceae family, characterized by its narrow leaves and small, edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Lycium depressum subsp. angustifolium include its high antioxidant capacity, anti-inflammatory effects, and ability to boost the immune system. The health benefits associated with consuming this plant include reducing oxidative stress, improving eye health, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Lycium depressum subsp. angustifolium include dried fruits, tea, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and mitigate various health conditions.
